description.en: Flagship 3-way Vento floorstander — 25 mm Black-Ceramic tweeter, 174 mm ATB midrange and twin 220 mm ATB woofers in a down-firing bass-reflex cabinet. Bi-wire/bi-amp terminals; crossover points 170 Hz / 3.2 kHz and 500 W music load capacity.
description.es: Floorstander Vento tope de gama de 3 vías — tweeter Black Ceramic de 25 mm, midrange ATB de 174 mm y dos woofers ATB de 220 mm en gabinete con reflex inferior. Terminales bi-wire/bi-amp; crossovers a 170 Hz / 3,2 kHz y capacidad de pico 500 W.
